title: hieracium schmidtii subsp. catriae
intro: Hieracium schmidtii subsp. catriae, also known as Hieracium catriae, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family, with the Latin name 'Hieracium' referring to the hawk or hawkweed. The medicinal properties of Hieracium schmidtii subsp. catriae lie in its roots and leaves, which contain flavonoids and other compounds with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. This plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Traditional herbal preparations of Hieracium schmidtii subsp. catriae include teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to treat various health issues, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
